title: Star Bazaar Global Group is Hiring: Floor Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Star Bazaar Global Group is Hiring: Floor Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Star Bazaar Global Group invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Floor Manager at our Faridabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Star Bazaar Global Group:
Star Bazaar Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Star Bazaar Global Group!
